message:
feat(combinator): add timeout!/try_join!/first_ok!/quorum!/retry! macros

Add placeholder macros for utility combinators that build on core primitives:

- timeout!: Race future against sleep, cancel on timeout
- try_join!: Join with short-circuit on first error
- first_ok!: Try operations sequentially until success
- quorum!: Wait for N of M futures to succeed
- retry!: Retry with configurable backoff

These are placeholder implementations following the pattern of join!/race!
macros. Full implementations will wire into Cx and scheduler.

Closes: bd-3q5v

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
